history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A night-time street race scene, seen from a low angle behind two riders on customized motorcycles. The rider in the foreground wears a black and blue patterned shirt with anime-style graphics on the back and light grey jeans. Their motorcycle is heavily modified with a grey and yellow fairing, purple rims, and exposed engine components. The rider to their left wears a black t-shirt and black helmet, also on a modified motorcycle, with a blue light emanating from it.

In the background, a large crowd of spectators and many more motorcycles are gathered, their headlights illuminating the dark road and surrounding trees. The overall atmosphere is one of excitement and anticipation, with the bright headlights and colorful bike modifications contrasting against the dark night. The style is realistic, capturing the gritty energy of an underground street racing event. The lighting is dramatic, with strong contrasts between the illuminated foreground and the deep shadows of the background, creating a sense of depth and mystery. The color palette is dominated by dark blues, blacks, greys, and yellows, with pops of vibrant purple and red from the motorcycles and lights.
